title: polypodium contortum
intro: Polypodium contortum, also known as Pacific polypody, is a species of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium contortum include reducing pain and swelling, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in treating various health conditions.
